raw_response:
Mgo added to alginate power modifies the shear and tear strength according to the referenced articles discussing alginate modifications and their effects. Therefore, the correct option is:
\boxed{C} Based on the reference to semiautomatic mechanical mixing improving the compressive strength and elastic recovery of alginates, magnesium oxide (MgO) added to alginate would similarly aim to enhance these mechanical properties rather than just increase surface character or simply extend shelf life. Thus,
\boxed{C} Magnesium oxide added to alginate power aims to specifically increase shear and tear strength.
